macro.title: Is housing inventory about to turn negative year over year?
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Why the hiring rate matters more than unemployment for the housing market
macro.what: We’re not getting new jobs in 2026
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Fed, Mortgage Rates Likely to Hold Steady on Latest Inflation Report
macro.what: Takeaway: Headline inflation, which includes food and energy prices, spiked in March, but rates won’t move much today because core inflation, which ignores those volatile components, remained subdued
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: Iran War Drives Mortgage Rate Volatility as Markets Brace for Inflation Data
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: With the Iran War stretching into its sixth week, mortgage rates will continue to ebb and flow with new developments

housing.title: FBI: Cybercrime losses topped $20.8B in 2025, real estate fraud hit $275M
housing.what: Real estate fraud alone accounted for 12,368 complaints, showing a continued and growing threat for housing professionals and clients.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Texas builder breaks ground on first community with Japanese firm
housing.what: Hankyu Hanshin and Bridge Tower broke ground on a 97-lot Corinth project as a new JV targets for-sale communities across Texas.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Virginia cities gain new tools to increase affordable housing supply
housing.what: Virginia law lets every locality adopt voluntary inclusionary zoning, density bonuses, ADUs and trust-fund fee options.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: New American Funding adds One Goal Mortgage to grow Nebraska, Iowa footprint
housing.what: New American Funding adds the One Goal Mortgage team, expanding purchase-focused coverage across Nebraska and southwest Iowa.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Redfin Earns Top 10 Spot in RealTrends Verified Rankings, Powered by Agent Productivity
housing.what: Redfin has been recognized among the top residential real estate brokerages for the fourth year in a row! In 2025, our agents closed 50,484 transactions, totaling nearly $32 billion in sales – earning the #8 spot on the RealTrends Verified Brokerage Rankings by both sales volume and transaction count
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: A Record 34% of February Home Sellers Cut Their List Price
housing.what: February home sellers who cut their price lowered it by $41,000, on average, or 7.3%
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: As retirement slips further away, workers prioritize stability and senior home equity
notables.what: Thirty percent of respondents said they’ve stopped looking for new work over the past five years because of job security concerns.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Unison faces more legal trouble over allegedly deceptive home equity agreements
notables.what: Plaintiffs say the company markets the product as involving no debt, but the terms of the HEI can force a large balloon-style payoff.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Top Century 21 firm expands into Michigan
notables.what: Leaders said the move reflects trends across Midwest markets, where relocation patterns increasingly cross state lines.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: NAR settles Tuccori homebuyer commission case for $52.25M
notables.what: NAR will contribute $52.25M to opt into the Tuccori homebuyer settlement and says the release is intended to cover Batton claims.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
